task_updates.executor_notes: Added coverage for `useAudioReactive()` and `useAudioParam()`, extended `DynamicEffectRegistry.test.tsx` with compiled audio-hook cases, added audio-binding validation/UI tests, added `AudioAnalysisProvider` lifecycle/data tests, and added a direct `templates.ts` smoke test that imports `AVAILABLE_GLOBALS`. Also updated the edge entrypoint test harness to mock the Fireworks SSE fetch path and logger flushing. Verified a temporary repro test for the compiled audio-reactive bug path, deleted it after it passed, then reran the full `src/tools/video-editor/` module (`29` files, `105` tests passed) and the full `supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/` module (`2` files, `7` tests passed).

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed the existing `DynamicEffectRegistry.test.tsx` suite still passes with the new audio-reactive cases, `supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/templates.test.ts` directly imports `AVAILABLE_GLOBALS` and asserts `useAudioReactive` plus `useAudioParam`, all new tests pass, and both full vitest modules now pass: `src/tools/video-editor/` and `supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/`.
